subjects.description: young red haired woman wearing a leafy crown by blue water
subjects.appearance_details: vibrant red hair, whimsical leafy crown, freckles, porcelain complexion, colorful knitted scarf, hair moving gently in the breeze
subjects.relationship: sole portrait subject gazing off camera in a serene coastal setting
subjects.location: foreground close to camera with serene blue waters softly visible behind her
subjects.relative_size: large portrait subject filling most of the frame
subjects.orientation: face angled slightly off camera toward the side light
subjects.pose: still upper body portrait with head gently turned and scarf wrapped around neck
subjects.action: gazes off camera in soft awe while breeze lifts loose strands of hair
subjects.state_changes: hair strands flutter, scarf edge shifts slightly, sunlight brightens freckles and cheek contours
subjects.clothing: colorful knitted scarf and leafy crown, upper clothing mostly outside the frame
subjects.expression: soft awe, calm wonder, reflective warmth
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: porcelain complexion with natural freckles, warm golden highlights, and realistic skin texture
subjects.facial_features: freckled cheeks, expressive eyes looking off camera, soft lips, delicate nose, vivid red hair framing the face

background_setting: A serene waterside scene with soft blue water in the background, open air, and a gentle unseen breeze moving the subject hair and scarf.

lighting.conditions: Warm golden sunlight across her freckled face, soft rim light on red hair, and cool blue water bounce in the background.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm golden sunlight across her freckled face, soft rim light on red hair, and cool blue water bounce in the background.

aesthetics.composition: Dreamy natural portrait, warm skin tones against cool blue water, red hair movement, handmade scarf texture, and quiet wonder.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Dreamy natural portrait, warm skin tones against cool blue water, red hair movement, handmade scarf texture, and quiet wonder.

cinematography.camera_motion: Intimate close portrait with shallow depth of field, static camera, subtle natural motion from wind, and soft background blur.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: Photorealistic cinematic portrait text to video.
artistic_style: Romantic natural light portrait realism with gentle fantasy details from the leafy crown.
context: A young woman stands by calm blue water, caught in a warm moment of awe as the wind plays through her hair.

actions.description: The camera holds on her freckled face as warm sunlight reveals the leafy crown and red hair.
A light breeze moves loose hair strands and the knitted scarf while she gazes off camera.
Her expression remains softly awed as golden light and blue water create a calm contrast.

segments.description: Establish the close portrait, leafy crown, red hair, freckles, and golden light.
segments.key_changes: Face comes into warm focus, background water stays softly blurred.
segments.camera: Static close up with shallow depth of field.

segments.description: Show subtle wind motion in hair and scarf while she looks off camera.
segments.key_changes: Hair strands lift and fall, scarf edge shifts, expression stays quiet and awed.
segments.camera: Very slow push toward the face.

segments.description: End on the serene contrast between warm portrait light and cool blue water.
segments.key_changes: Sunlight glows across freckles, motion settles into a calm portrait hold.
segments.camera: Held close view with minimal movement.

temporal_caption: A young red haired woman with a leafy crown and colorful scarf gazes off camera in warm sunlight by calm blue water.
audio_description: Soft breeze, faint water movement, gentle fabric rustle, and quiet outdoor ambience.
